title: The International Monetary Fund and Bank Act, 1945
full_text: The International Monetary Fund and Bank Act, 1945 अन्तरराष्‍ट्रीय मुद्रा निधि और बैंक अधिनियम, 1945 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 194547 Act Number: 47 Enactment Date: 1945-12-24 Act Year: 1945 Short Title: The International Monetary Fund and Bank Act, 1945 Hindi Title: अन्तरराष्‍ट्रीय मुद्रा निधि और बैंक अधिनियम, 1945 Long Title: An Act to implement the International Monetary Fund and Bank Agreements. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Economic Affairs Enforcement Date: 24-12-1945 Last Updated: 05-02-2019 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The International Monetary Fund and Bank Act, 1945 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Payments to International Fund and Bank. Section 3. Reserve Bank to be depository for International Fund and Bank. Section 3A. Reserve Bank to use, receive, acquire, etc., special drawing rights on behalf of Central Government. Section 4. Power to call for information. Section 5. Certain provisions of Agreements to have force of law. Section 6. Repealed. Section 7. Power to make rules. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE.
